name: update_profile
description: Update the user's living profile (CONTEXT.md) when they share or change core facts about themselves: recurring schedules, preferences, work hours, routines, or corrections to previously stored info. Use this instead of store_context when the info is a permanent/semi-permanent fact, not a one-off note.

action.description: What to do: 'add' a new fact, 'remove' an outdated fact, or 'update' an existing fact.

section.description: Which section of the profile to modify. 'Schedule' for recurring meetings/standups. 'Routines' for habits like gym, meal prep. 'Preferences' for settings and preferences. 'Work' for job/team info.

content.description: The line to add/update. For 'remove', the text to search for and delete.
